summary: Code review verification of Birth Summary Preview Modal enhancement. The implementation in BirthRecordSection.tsx is correctly done: Report button opens preview modal (NOT immediate download), modal shows Baby name, Birth Details (time/place/mode), Vital Stats (weight/length), APGAR Scores (1min/5min), Status (Mother/Baby), with Cancel and Download PDF buttons. Playwright UI testing had challenges with React Native Web login flow (clicks not triggering form submission), but code review confirms correct implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: Preview modal implementation verified in BirthRecordSection.tsx (lines 937-1098)
Report button correctly calls openReportPreview() which sets showPreviewModal(true) (line 465)
Modal includes all required sections: Baby info card, Birth Details, Vital Stats, APGAR Scores, Status
Cancel button closes modal via setShowPreviewModal(false) (line 1077)
Download PDF button calls handleDownloadReport() which fetches PDF from backend (line 1083)
data-testid='download-birth-report-btn' present on Report button for testing (line 466)
seed_data_creation: Existing test data: TEST_PV_Client_200830 (client_a034be9c9748) with birth record for baby 'Comprehensive Test Baby'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview modal feature is correctly implemented based on code review. The Playwright automation had issues with React Native Web button clicks not triggering form submission during login. For future UI testing, consider using page.tap() or dispatchEvent with touchstart/touchend events for React Native Web components. The previous iteration (135) confirmed the feature works - Report button is functional and PDF download API returns 200.
